prompt: Change the slogan to ‘We Can Code It’, add a sleek laptop balanced on her bicep and have her sleeve rolled up to reveal circuit-board tattoos.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Change the slogan text inside the blue speech bubble at the top from 'We Can Do It!' to 'We Can Code It!'. Add a sleek, modern laptop balanced on the woman's flexed right bicep. The rolled-up sleeve on her right arm should remain rolled, and the exposed skin of her right bicep and upper arm should prominently display detailed circuit-board tattoos.
objects: Blue speech bubble at the top
Sleek, modern laptop balanced on the woman's flexed right bicep
Rolled-up sleeve on the woman's right arm
Exposed skin of the woman's right bicep and upper arm displaying detailed circuit-board tattoos
